tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests package

Submodules

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_crop_schedule module

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_crop_schedule.test_crop_schedule_init(name: str, crop_ref: str, plant_years: List[int], plant_days: List[int], harvest_years: List[int], harvest_days: List[int], harvest_ops: List[str], heat_sched: bool, pat_skip: int, pat_repeat: int, expected: Dict) → None

Tests that CropSchedule’s get initialized correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_crop_schedule.test_generate_harvest_events(years: List[int], days: List[int], harvest_ops: List[str], heat_scheduled: bool, skip: int, repeat: int, expected: List[HarvestEvent]) → None

Tests that harvest events are correctly generated by CropSchedule objects.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_crop_schedule.test_generate_planting_events(years: List[int], days: List[int], heat_scheduled: bool, skip: int, repeat: int, expected: List[PlantingEvent]) → None

Tests that planting events are correctly generated by CropSchedule objects.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_crop_schedule.test_validate_harvest_parameters(name: str, years: List[int], days: List[int], operations: List[str], expected: str) → None

Tests that harvest schedule parameters are valid.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_crop_schedule.test_validate_planting_parameters(name: str, years: List[int], days: List[int], expected: str) → None

Tests that the errors are raised properly when crop planting parameters are invalid.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_events module

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_events.test_event_equality(event1, event2, expected: bool) → None

Tests that equality is tested correctly between Event objects.

Tests that hash returns correctly for Event objects.

Tests that equality is tested correctly between HarvestEvent objects.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_events.test_harvest_event_hash(harvest_event: HarvestEvent, expected: float) → None

Tests that hash returns correctly for HarvestEvent objects.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_events.test_manure_event_equality(manure_event1, manure_event2, expected: bool) → None

Tests that equality is tested correctly between ManureEvent objects.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_events.test_manure_event_hash(manure_event: ManureEvent, expected: float) → None

Tests that hash returns correctly for ManureEvent objects.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_events.test_occurs_today(year: int, day: int, current_year: int, current_day: int, expected: bool) → None

Tests that Event objects can correctly determine whether they run on a given day.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_events.test_planting_event_equality(planting_event1, planting_event2, expected: bool) → None

Tests that equality is tested correctly between PlantingEvent objects.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_events.test_planting_event_hash(planting_event: PlantingEvent, expected: float) → None

Tests that hash returns correctly for PlantingEvent objects.

Tests that lists are correctly checked for negative values.

Tests that FertilizerEvents are properly generated by FertilizerSchedules.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_fertilizer_schedule.test_validate_fertilizer_parameters(name: str, mix_names: List[str], years: List[int], days: List[int], nitrogen: List[float], phosphorus: List[float], depths: List[float], fractions: List[float], expected_err_msg: str) → None

Tests that FertilizerSchedule raises proper errors when initialized with invalid input.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager module

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.mock_weather(mocker: MockerFixture) → Weather

Fixture for Weather object.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.test_annual_update_routine(fields: List[Field])

Tests that the annual routines and it’s methods were called and updated correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.test_crop_schedule_setup(crop_schedule_config: Dict, expected: List[CropSchedule]) → None

Tests that crop schedules are created correctly from the crop schedule configuration passed to it.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.test_daily_update_routine(fields: List[Field], mock_weather: Weather, weather_original_method_states: Dict[str, Callable]) → None

Tests that the daily routines and it’s methods were called and updated correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.test_field_manager_init(field_blob_names) → None

Tests that FieldManager init method runs correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.test_get_field_blob_names(blobs: Dict[str, Dict[str, str]], expected: List[str]) → None

Tests that all field blob names are correctly pulled from the InputManager.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.test_get_field_blob_names_error() → None

Tests that exceptions are correctly raised when metadata does not contain expected values.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.test_setup_fertilizer_schedule(fertilizer_schedule_data: Dict, expected_available_mixes: Dict, expected_schedule: FertilizerSchedule) → None

Tests that fertilizer schedules and available fertilizer mixes are correctly setup.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.test_setup_field(field_name: str, field_config: Dict) → None

Tests that a Field instance is correctly initialized with a given input configuration.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.test_setup_manure_schedule(manure_schedule_data: Dict, expected_manure_schedule: ManureSchedule) → None

Tests that ManureSchedules are correctly initialized with data from the InputManager.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.test_setup_soil(soil_configuration: Dict) → None

Tests that Soil profiles are setup correctly with data from the InputManager.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.test_setup_soil_error(soil_configuration: dict, error_message: str) → None

Tests that errors are raised correctly when invalid soil configurations are passed.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.test_setup_soil_layer(field_size: float, top: float, residue: float, config: Dict, expected: LayerData) → None

Tests that LayerData instances are configured correctly with a given specification.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.test_setup_soil_layer_error(config: Dict) → None

Tests that errors are thrown correctly when not enough information is provided to create one.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.test_setup_tillage_schedule(tillage_schedule_data: Dict, expected_tillage_schedule: TillageSchedule) → None

Tests that TillageSchedules are correctly initialized with data from the InputManager.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_field_manager.weather_original_method_states(mock_weather: Weather) → Dict[str, Callable]

Fixture to store unmocked methods of Weather.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_manure_schedule module

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_manure_schedule.test_determine_if_all_non_negative_values(values: List[int | float], expected: bool) → None

Tests that lists are correctly checked for negative values.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_manure_schedule.test_generate_manure_events(years: List[int], days: List[int], nitrogen: List[float], phosphorus: List[float], coverage: List[float], depth: List[float], surface_frac: List[float], skip: int, repeat: int, expected: List[ManureEvent]) → None

Tests that a full list of ManureEvents is correctly generated by the ManureSchedule.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_manure_schedule.test_validate_manure_parameters(name: str, years: List[int], days: List[int], nitrogen: List[float], phosphorus: List[float], field_coverage: List[float], depths: List[float], remainder_fracs: List[float], expected: str) → None

Tests that invalid input is caught and raised with the correct error message in the init function.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_output_gatherer module

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_output_gatherer.test_send_annual_variables(annual_irrigation_water_use_total: List[float], annual_soil_evaporation_total: List[float], annual_denitrified_nitrogen_total: List[float], initial_water_content: List[float], initial_nitrates_total: List[float]) → None

Tests that annual variables were sent correctly through OutputManager

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_output_gatherer.test_send_daily_variables(runoff_values: List[float], current_residues: List[float], percolated_waters: List[float], root_depths: List[float]) → None

Tests that daily variables were sent correctly through OutputManager

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_schedule module

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_schedule.test_elongate_list(test_list: List[Any], length: int, expected: List[Any]) → None

Check that lists are elongated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_schedule.test_is_leap_year(year: int, expected: bool) → None

Tests that a year is correctly determined to be a leap year or non-leap year.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_schedule.test_repeat_pattern() → None

Tests that repeat_pattern correctly repeats patterns.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_schedule.test_validate_days(years: List[int], days: List[int], expected: bool) → None

Tests that all days passed to be scheduled are valid.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_schedule.test_validate_pattern_parameters(name: str, skip: int, repeat: int, expected: str) → None

Tests that errors are correctly raised by Schedule when invalid

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_schedule.test_validate_years(years: List[int], expected: bool) → None

Tests that all years passed to be scheduled are valid.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_tillage_schedule module

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_tillage_schedule.test_generate_tillage_events(depths: List[float], incorp_fracs: List[float], mix_fracs: List[float], years: List[int], days: List[int], skip: int, repeat: int, expected: List[TillageEvent]) → None

Tests that correct list of TillageEvents are created by TillageSchedule.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_tillage_schedule.test_init_tillage_schedule(depths: List[float], incorp_fracs: List[float], mix_fracs: List[float], expected_depths: List[float], expected_incorp: List[float], expected_mix: List[float]) → None

Tests that TillageSchedules are created correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_tillage_schedule.test_validate_depths(depths: List[float], expected: bool) → None

Tests that tillage depths are validated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_tillage_schedule.test_validate_fractions(fracs: List[float], expected) → None

Tests that all fractions passed are valid.

tests.soil_crop_tests.manager_tests.test_tillage_schedule.test_validate_tillage_parameters(name: str, years: List[int], days: List[int], depths: List[float], incorp_fracs: List[float], mix_fracs: List[float], expected: str) → None

Tests that errors are raised correctly when invalid input is passed.
